questions.prompt: Which object provides inherited fallback text styling when `Text.style` leaves values null?
questions.explanation: DefaultTextStyle carries inherited text styling and fills in values that local TextStyle does not specify.

questions.prompt: Overflow behavior only becomes interesting after width constraints are limited.
questions.explanation: A paragraph needs layout constraints before wrapping, clipping, or ellipsis decisions appear.

questions.prompt: Arrange the learning focus from visible output to deeper structure.
questions.explanation: The lesson starts with what you see, then explains style resolution, then ties text back to layout width and accessibility meaning.
